context: You are visiting a doctor at a clinic in Moscow. You are not feeling well and need to describe your symptoms.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you have a headache and a fever
acceptedResponses: У меня болит голова и температура
У меня головная боль и температура
У меня сильная головная боль и жар
exchanges.hint: У меня болит голова и температура.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: How long have you been sick?

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Понятно. Есть ли другие симптомы? Кашель, насморк?
exchanges.translation: I see. Are there other symptoms? Cough, runny nose?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say yes, you also have a cough

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Я выпишу вам лекарство. Принимайте его три раза в день после еды.
exchanges.translation: I will prescribe medicine. Take it three times a day after meals.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask if you need to come back

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Да, приходите через неделю. Если станет хуже, звоните сразу.
exchanges.translation: Yes, come back in a week. If it gets worse, call immediately.
